"They keep telling us that we have to be informed consumers with healthcare. This is not trying to pick between Cocoa Puffs and Cap'n Crunch. We can't understand this stuff. It's too complicated. We need one fix, not this little crap." – @LAGurwitch on #TrumpRx #RTOvertime

posts.text: Trump just said what I said Friday: the other side never claps for the other team, advertising to the world that the state of our nation is HOPELESSLY DIVIDED.
posts.quote: Trump just said what I said Friday: the other side never claps for the other team, advertising to the world that the state of our nation is HOPELESSLY DIVIDED.

posts.text: Ya see? All this talk about what the president is going to propose to congress? That was my editorial Friday, congress is supposed to propose laws, executive branch is supposed to execute!! Like a Venezuelan drug boat.
